subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Wronged One whilst He was in prison through that which the hands of the heedless had wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی المظلوم اذ کان فی السجن بما اکتسبت ایدی الغافلین
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
